prose:
**Furan Mulliken Fukui indices** — DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (no density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0 (singlet), cation: charge +1 (doublet), anion: charge –1 (doublet). Geometry: fixed input `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz`; no relaxation (`Fukui//input`). SCFs for the N, N±1 states all converged; integrity.status = ok (trustworthy = true). No engine warnings were reported.

Most electrophilic site: atom 5 (C, index 4) with f⁺ = 1.9242931 (dimensionless).
Most nucleophilic site: atom 5 (C, index 4) with f⁻ = 0.1616371.
Dual descriptor at that atom: +1.762656 (electrophilic character).

Full Mulliken Fukui vectors (9 atoms, O C C C C H H H H):
• f⁺ = [−1.3316182, 1.2286866, 1.2270264, 1.9233053, 1.9242931, −1.2190639, −1.2191055, −0.76678308, −0.76674059]
• f⁻ = [ 0.08382155, 0.089103093, 0.089304821, 0.16152700, 0.16163710, 0.10248412, 0.10251350, 0.10481615, 0.10479266]
• dual = [−1.4154398, 1.1395835, 1.1377216, 1.7617783, 1.7626560, −1.3215481, −1.3216190, −0.87159923, −0.87153325]

Calculation used chemkit’s `fukui-reactivity` skill with explicit `--method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp`, run in the gas phase with neutral singlet reference. Output JSON: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpezk0nf5k/live.json`; plot image at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/argo_o3/20260706-183630_furan_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`. Live engine log was streamed to the corresponding `.out` file in the same scratch directory.

This result is computed with PySCF DFT; no experimental data are involved (provenance: computed).
